mapper.sql: cp.id, cp.family_user_id, cp.elderly_id, cp.plan_name, cp.description, cp.service_type, cp.service_frequency, cp.start_date, cp.end_date, cp.status, cp.audit_status, cp.audit_by, cp.audit_time, cp.audit_remark, cp.claim_status, cp.assigned_volunteer_id, cp.claimed_time, cp.period_type, cp.services_per_period, cp.total_periods, cp.current_period, cp.total_services, cp.completed_services, cp.approved_services, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, cp.created_by

SELECT , v.full_name as volunteer_name, v.phone as volunteer_phone, v.avatar as volunteer_avatar, f.full_name as family_name, f.phone as family_phone, e.name as elderly_name, e.age as elderly_age, e.address as elderly_address, a.full_name as auditor_name FROM care_plan cp LEFT JOIN sys_user v ON cp.assigned_volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN sys_user f ON cp.family_user_id = f.id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON cp.audit_by = a.id LEFT JOIN elderly_info e ON cp.elderly_id = e.id
mapper.select: WHERE cp.family_user_id = #{familyUserId} ORDER BY CASE cp.audit_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE cp.status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, cp.created_at DESC
ORDER BY CASE cp.audit_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, cp.created_at DESC
WHERE cp.status = #{status} ORDER BY cp.created_at DESC
WHERE cp.audit_status = #{auditStatus} ORDER BY cp.created_at ASC
WHERE cp.audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY cp.created_at ASC
WHERE cp.audit_status = 'APPROVED' AND cp.claim_status = 'UNCLAIMED' AND cp.status = 'DRAFT' ORDER BY cp.created_at ASC
WHERE cp.assigned_volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY CASE cp.status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, cp.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO care_plan ( family_user_id, elderly_id, plan_name, description, service_type, service_frequency, start_date, end_date, status, audit_status, claim_status, period_type, services_per_period, total_periods, current_period, total_services, completed_services, approved_services, created_by ) VALUES ( #{familyUserId}, #{elderlyId}, #{planName}, #{description}, #{serviceType}, #{serviceFrequency}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{auditStatus}, #{claimStatus}, #{periodType}, #{servicesPerPeriod}, #{totalPeriods}, #{currentPeriod}, #{totalServices}, #{completedServices}, #{approvedServices}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE care_plan SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = NOW(), audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE care_plan SET claim_status = 'CLAIMED', assigned_volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}, claimed_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND claim_status = 'UNCLAIMED' AND audit_status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE audit_status = #{auditStatus}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE audit_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE audit_status = 'APPROVED' AND claim_status = 'UNCLAIMED' AND status = 'DRAFT'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE assigned_volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan WHERE assigned_volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
